ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "hid" INTEGER /* Housing ID */,
  "crim" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "zn" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (= 1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centres */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of blacks by town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* % lower status of the population */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median house prices in $1000's */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Property type identifier */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location identifier */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the property */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "property_year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "property_last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was last sold */,
  "property_last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "property_list_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "property_list_price" REAL /* Price at which the property is currently listed */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of nearby amenities (e.g., schools, parks, hospitals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties of this type */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of properties of this type */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity index of the property type */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Trends and insights related to the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
